Mastermind Live Teaching with Bas Wouters | session 2
Deep-dive on Contrast
In this engaging session, Bas Wouters offers an insightful exploration of the principle of Contrast and its practical applications in
persuasion. Discover how contrasting elements can dramatically shape perceptions and decisions, both personally and
professionally. Bas will guide you through real-world examples, demonstrating the effectiveness of this principle in various contexts.
This session is an opportunity to deepen your understanding of Contrast and enhance your skills in ethical influence.
Mastermind Teaching
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
